title: solanum occultum
side_effects: Solanum occultum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's leaves or roots can also lead to more severe health issues, including gastrointestinal problems and allergic reactions. In rare cases, improper use of Solanum occultum has been linked to neurological problems, such as tremors and muscle weakness. If ingested in large quantities, the plant's toxic compounds can cause respiratory failure, cardiac arrest, and even death.
